metadata.description: Reference skills for vLLM, Kubernetes, release engineering, and Claude Code authoring. Each plugin ships one SKILL.md plus supporting references.

plugins.name: autoresearch
plugins.description: Karpathy-pattern autoresearch

plugins.name: baml-expert
plugins.description: BAML (Boundary ML) expert for projects defining LLM calls as typed functions in .baml files with a generated Python client

plugins.name: helm
plugins.description: Author and maintain Helm charts: create chart, write templates, values.yaml patterns, _helpers.tpl, Chart.yaml, values.schema.json, helm-docs, library charts

plugins.name: jinja-expert
plugins.description: Author, read, and debug Jinja2 templates across the three places Jinja lives in 2026

plugins.name: keda
plugins.description: Configure, operate, and master KEDA (Kubernetes Event-driven Autoscaling)

plugins.name: makefile-best-practices
plugins.description: Makefile best practices, patterns, and templates for GNU Make 4.x

plugins.name: openshift-app
plugins.description: Package applications for OpenShift deployment: container images (UBI, arbitrary UID, multi-stage builds), packaging formats (Helm, Kustomize, Operators, OLM v1), CI/CD (Tekton, ArgoCD, Shipwright,…

plugins.name: skill-improver
plugins.description: Autoresearch loop for Claude Code skills

plugins.name: vllm-benchmarking
plugins.description: How to run production vLLM benchmarks

plugins.name: vllm-caching
plugins.description: vLLM tiered KV cache configuration for production H100/H200 clusters

plugins.name: vllm-chat-templates
plugins.description: vLLM chat-template (prompt-side Jinja) operator reference

plugins.name: vllm-configuration
plugins.description: How to configure vLLM completely

plugins.name: vllm-deployment
plugins.description: Deploy production vLLM on Kubernetes, OpenShift, Docker/Podman lab

plugins.name: vllm-input-modalities
plugins.description: vLLM operator reference for non-chat inference surfaces

plugins.name: vllm-nvidia-hardware
plugins.description: NVIDIA AI-hardware + vLLM-platform reference covering Hopper (H100/H200), Blackwell (B100/B200/B300) and Blackwell Ultra, Grace-Blackwell superchips and NVL72 racks (GB200, GB300), Vera Rubin…

plugins.name: vllm-observability
plugins.description: How to observe production vLLM deployments

plugins.name: vllm-omni
plugins.description: vLLM-Omni operator reference for output-side multimodal generation

plugins.name: vllm-performance-tuning
plugins.description: vLLM performance-tuning operator reference

plugins.name: vllm-quantization
plugins.description: vLLM datacenter-GPU quantization operator reference

plugins.name: vllm-reasoning-parsers
plugins.description: vLLM reasoning-parser operator + developer reference

plugins.name: vllm-speculative-decoding
plugins.description: How to pick, configure, tune, and monitor vLLM speculative decoding in production

plugins.name: vllm-tool-parsers
plugins.description: vLLM tool-calling operator reference
